text.content:
EZ-Followers

EZ-Followers is a small WFRP4e module for Foundry VTT that adds a dedicated Followers tab to character sheets.

The current version establishes the tab and the supporting journal pack. The long-term goal is to make it easier to track hirelings, henchmen, and other attached NPC support directly from a character sheet.

Current Status

  • Adds a Followers tab to WFRP4e character sheets.
  • Provides a rules compendium with module notes and usage guidance.
  • Follower management inside the tab is still in active development.
